title: Portuguese Wood Fired Cheese Bake
description: A rich and savory cheese bake infused with the deep flavors of Portuguese spices, fired to perfection in a wood fired oven.
instructions: Preheat the wood fired oven to 400°F (200°C).
Cut the bread into 1-inch (2.5cm) cubes and place in a bowl.
Add the cheese blend, thyme, garlic, and salt to the bowl and toss to combine.
Drizzle the olive oil over the bread mixture and toss again to coat.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
